en.extract:
Fork-tailed swift is the historic name of a kind of bird which has since been divided taxonomically into four species. It could refer to any of four different species of Apus swifts:

Pacific swift, Apus pacificus
Salim Ali's swift, Apus salimali
Blyth's swift, Apus leuconyx
Cook's swift, Apus cooki
en.wikitext:
'''Fork-tailed swift''' is the historic name of a kind of bird which has since been divided taxonomically into four species. It could refer to any of four different species of ''[[Apus (bird)|Apus]]'' swifts:

*[[Pacific swift]], ''Apus pacificus''
*[[Salim Ali's swift]], ''Apus salimali''
*[[Blyth's swift]], ''Apus leuconyx''
*[[Cook's swift]], ''Apus cooki''

{{Animal common name}}
